original: The piercing bullets go wide!
The burning bullets hit you square in the chest!
The toxic loads harmlessly splatters on the ground!
The toxic bullet connects with you! Your heartbeat rises and your focus plummets as the vibrant pink liquid spreads an arousing warmth through your veins!
\nThe lumbering strike goes wide!
\nThe heavy claw hits you where it hurts!
The powerful lunge staggers you!

You leap sideways, avoiding the Battlesuit’s charge by a hair’s breadth! The cumbersome machine continues her course for a few seconds before drifting back on course on screeching wheels. They’ll be harder to hit now!

The Raskvel Battlesuit ".concat(e.isTripped()?"runs you over":"overruns you","! The war machine turns around and rolls toward you, weapons at the ready to finish you off. Until her secondary engine fails, she’ll be harder to hit!")
\nThe missile goes wide!
\nThe cryo-missile hits you square in the chest, engulfing you in a chilly nimbus!
The glacial fog [silly|transforms you into a walking icicle|leaves you deeply frozen]!

The grappling claw misses you! “NOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO! LILYBELLE, DO SOMETHING!” “Lilybelle is not responsible for Master’s poor aim. Try again later.” The Mad Rask angrily complains within his creation while hidden servomotors tug the crane-like limb back in place. You have to finish them up before they pull this trick again!

The rocket-propelled claw closes on you and pins you to the ground! “YES! TAKE THAT YOU STUPID GOON! LILYBELLE! TEAR [pc.mf|HIM|HER] TO SHRED!” “[silly|To shreds you say?|Roger Roger!] Initiating Fusion Grinders!” Fusion Grinders? You must get out of this snare, quickly!

Fortunately, you evade the devastating beams of light! “NOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO! LILYBELLE, RECHARGE THE LASER EYES!” “Power supply insufficient.” They won’t be able to use this trick again, but it doesn’t mean you are safe!
The red laser beams hit you square in the chest!
You resist the deluge of arousing images and lewd stimuli flooding your mind!
Your cheeks turn crimson and you have to stop yourself from masturbating and groping your assets!

Hundreds of sparks come out of the Raskvel Battlesuit’s joints. Its servomotors and piston vibrate erratically and its subsystems die one after the other - either short-circuited or energy-starved. Lilybelle and the Mad Rask are out of commission!
The mad rask is too horny and his machine is too jealous to continue fighting!
